name: Highland Keep Defenders
description: A dwarven forge-clan holding the old mountain keep under a siege that has run three seasons too long. Short of ore, shorter of ale, never short of grudge. They will open the wicket to a stranger who carries something worth forging a favor for.

name: Bone-Banner Horde
description: A loose confederation of mountain raiders under a chieftain who claims to have eaten the last one. Their standards are painted skulls on poles; the paint is not always paint. They besiege the Highland Keep because the forge burns bright enough to see from their ancestral high passes, and they resent the light.
